tasks.instruction: Add the current METAR and TAF for airport KJFK to your 'Today’s Briefing' dashboard, set the units to knots and statute miles, and order the METAR above the TAF.

tasks.instruction: Plan a VFR route from KSFO to a destination airport within 120 NM that has a runway at least 4,500 ft long, choose the option with the highest user rating, and save the route to your 'Practice Flights' list named 'KSFO cross-country #1'.

tasks.instruction: Search for IFR ground school courses under $150 with a rating of at least 4.5 and total duration of at least 8 hours, then add the cheapest qualifying course to your training plan with an IFR rating goal and a target completion date in 2026.

tasks.instruction: Find IFR weather webinars happening in October 2026, register for the earliest one in that month, and set a reminder via site notifications only for 1 day before the event.

tasks.instruction: Locate articles about Class B airspace published in 2022 or later with an estimated reading time of 15 minutes or less, and save the first three matching articles to a reading list named 'Checkride Prep'.

target_names: Class B Airspace Basics for VFR Pilots
Getting and Reading a Class B Clearance
Flying Traffic Patterns Near Class B Airports

tasks.instruction: At a Denver-area flight school with a rating of at least 4 stars, compare an IFR-capable Cessna 172 and Piper Archer that each cost no more than $180/hour wet, and mark the aircraft with the lower hourly wet rate as your preferred trainer (if the rates are equal, choose the one listed higher in the comparison).

tasks.instruction: Find an aviation medical examiner within 30 miles of ZIP code 30303 who performs Class 1 medicals and has weekday appointments available before 6:00 PM, then save the examiner with the earliest qualifying availability to a 'Medical Contacts' group.

target_names: Dr. Michael Thompson - Northside Aviation Medical

tasks.instruction: Post a new question in the pilot forum’s 'Landings' category titled 'Short-field landing tips for Cessna 172', with a body of at least two sentences, exactly three tags ('short-field', 'landing', 'C172'), and site notifications only enabled for replies.
